---
title: "NPOR: Tables"
author: jellevanderwerff
date: 09/08/2022
output:
    html_notebook:
        code_folding: hide
        toc: true
        toc_float: true
---

```{r load-packages, message = FALSE, echo = FALSE}
############# PACKAGES AND OTHER PRELIMINARIES ############

# for easy loading of packages
if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")

# load packages
p_load("stringr", "ini", "gdata", "plyr", "dplyr", "here", "ggplot2", "reshape2", "ggsci", "knitr", "kableExtra")

# for relative file paths (e.g. here('Input', 'file.csv'))
here::i_am(file.path("scripts", "tables.Rmd"))

# Load custom helper functions
source(here("scripts", "helper_functions.R"))

# Knitr output settingsecho = TRUE,
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    echo = FALSE,
    warning = TRUE,
    message = FALSE
)
```


```{r load-data, echo = FALSE}
ITIs <- readRDS(here("Dataframes", "ITIs.rds"))
ITIs.bytrial <- readRDS(here("Dataframes", "ITIs_bytrial.rds"))
interval.ratios.maxima <- readRDS(here("Dataframes", "interval_ratios_maxima.rds"))
```

# Group-level descriptive statistics

```{r descriptives-group-level}
trial_descriptives <- ddply(ITIs.bytrial, .(stim_tempo_intended, length), dplyr::summarize,
    n = length(sequence_id),
    mean_stim_tempo = mean(stim_tempo),
    stim_sd = mean(stim_sd),
    mean_tapping_tempo = mean(ITI_mean),
    mean_sd = mean(ITI_sd),
    median_edit_distance = median(edit_distance),
    mean_stim_entropy = mean(stim_entropy),
    mean_resp_entropy = mean(resp_entropy),
    mean_entropy_diff = mean(entropy_diff),
    G_mean = mean(G),
    G_sd = sd(G)
)

col_names <- c(
    "Tempo cond.",
    "Length cond.",
    "n",
    "IOI mean",
    "IOI SD",
    "ITI mean",
    "ITI SD",
    "Edit distance median",
    "Stim entropy mean",
    "Resp entropy mean",
    "Entropy difference",
    "G mean",
    "G SD"
)

kbl(trial_descriptives, col.names = col_names) %>% kable_styling("striped", position = "left", full_width = FALSE)
```


# Interval ratios

```{r interval-ratios}

getmode <- function(v) {
   uniqv <- unique(v)
   uniqv[which.max(tabulate(match(v, uniqv)))]
}

ratios_summary <- ddply(interval.ratios.maxima, .(stim_tempo_intended, length), dplyr::summarize,
n_maxima_median = median(n_maxima),
n_maxima_mode = getmode(n_maxima))

col_names <- c("Tempo cond.", "Length cond.", "Median n maxima", "Mode n maxima")

kbl(ratios_summary, col.names = col_names) %>% kable_styling("striped", position = "left", full_width = FALSE)
```

```{r interval-ratios-maxima-frequencies}

# the code below is super stupid; but too tired too find another method for now
ratios_summary <- ddply(interval.ratios.maxima, .(stim_tempo_intended, length, n_maxima), dplyr::summarize,
n = length(n_maxima))

ratios_summary$sum <- NA

sums <- ddply(interval.ratios.maxima, .(stim_tempo_intended, length), summarize,
total_observations = length(n_maxima))

for (tempo in unique(ratios_summary$stim_tempo_intended)) {
    for (length in unique(ratios_summary$length)) {
        sum <- sums$total_observations[(sums$stim_tempo_intended == tempo) & (sums$length == length)]
        ratios_summary$sum[(ratios_summary$stim_tempo_intended == tempo) & (ratios_summary$length == length)] <- sum
    }
}

ratios_summary$percentage <- round(ratios_summary$n / ratios_summary$sum * 100, 2)

col_names <- c("Tempo cond.", "Length cond.", "n maxima", "n", "sum_n", "percentage")

kbl(ratios_summary, col.names = col_names) %>% kable_styling("striped", position = "left", full_width = FALSE)
```
